game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Dungeon Survival:** Players assemble a party of up to four heroes from nine distinct classes, each with unique skill sets, and navigate randomly generated dungeon levels by tapping on adjacent tiles to move and tapping on enemies to initiate turn-based combat. During combat, players select actions for each party member from a UI panel, choosing between basic attacks, class-specific skills (e.g., dealing 50 damage, healing 30 HP, applying status effects), and item usage, with turn order determined by character speed stats. Defeated monsters and opened chests yield gold and hundreds of randomized equipment pieces (e.g., weapons, armor, accessories) that can be enchanted to boost specific stats (e.g., +10 Attack) or reformed for new properties. Progression involves completing story quests, leveling up heroes to unlock new skills and improve base stats (e.g., +5 HP, +2 Attack per level), and collecting powerful gear to overcome increasingly challenging encounters. Difficulty scales through deeper dungeon levels featuring stronger monsters (e.g., 100-500 HP), more complex enemy formations, and challenging boss encounters that require strategic party composition and skill usage. The core loop focuses on exploring, fighting, looting, and upgrading the party to delve deeper into the dungeons and uncover the mysteries of Black Haze, with a game over occurring if all party members' HP reach zero.
game_info.description: Assemble a party of heroes and delve into the dangerous dungeons of Black Haze. Navigate through randomly generated levels, engage in turn-based combat against monsters, collect powerful loot, and level up your heroes. Each hero has unique abilities - use them strategically to survive increasingly difficult encounters. Your goal is to reach dungeon level 5 and defeat the final boss. If all party members fall in battle, it's game over.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate dungeon tiles and menu selections
Space: Confirm action / Select party member in combat
Z: Use basic attack in combat / Cancel in menus
Shift: Access skill menu in combat
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen (from game over)

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic movement and exploration mechanics. Validates that the player can navigate the dungeon grid, move between tiles, and trigger combat encounters with enemies.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move randomly through the dungeon using arrow keys. When encountering enemies, engage in combat and use basic attacks. Continue exploring until reaching stairs or game over.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player should successfully move around the dungeon, trigger combat with enemies, and be able to attack them. Position tracking should show movement across tiles. Test is successful if movement and combat initiation work without errors.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing combat mechanics and skill usage. Validates that different hero abilities work correctly, turn order is proper, and damage/healing calculations are accurate.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Engage in combat and cycle through all available skills for each hero class. Test healing abilities, damage dealing skills, and status effects. Verify turn order follows speed stats.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: All skills should execute properly with correct damage/healing values. Turn order should be consistent with speed stats. Status effects should apply and wear off correctly. Test succeeds when all combat mechanics function as designed.
TEST_3.description: Testing combat mechanics and skill usage. Validates that different hero abilities work correctly, turn order is proper, and damage/healing calculations are accurate.

TEST_3.expected: All skills should execute properly with correct damage/healing values. Turn order should be consistent with speed stats. Status effects should apply and wear off correctly. Test succeeds when all combat mechanics function as designed.

TEST_4.test_description: Testing inventory and equipment system. Validates that loot drops from enemies, items can be equipped, and stat bonuses are applied correctly.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Defeat enemies to collect equipment drops. Navigate to inventory menu and equip items on different heroes. Verify that stat changes reflect equipped items.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Items should drop after combat victories. Equipment menu should display available items and allow equipping. Hero stats should update when items are equipped. Test succeeds when equipment system works without errors.
TEST_4.description: Testing inventory and equipment system. Validates that loot drops from enemies, items can be equipped, and stat bonuses are applied correctly.

TEST_5.test_description: Testing level progression and difficulty scaling. Validates that deeper dungeon levels have stronger enemies and that heroes level up with improved stats.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Progress through multiple dungeon levels, tracking enemy stats at each level. Monitor hero stat growth through level-ups. Verify that difficulty increases appropriately.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Enemy HP and damage should scale up with each dungeon level. Heroes should gain stats when leveling up. Combat should become progressively more challenging. Test succeeds when scaling mechanics are confirmed.
